operations.title: Dead by Daylight’s Black Banquet Has Begun: Everything To Know
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: The 10th anniversary Black Banquet event goes live with themed progression, limited-time rewards, and event-specific gameplay hooks.

operations.title: Shane Wiigwaas Is Dead By Daylight’s Latest Survivor
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: Introduces survivor Shane Wiigwaas and outlines his perk kit ahead of the June 25 release.

operations.title: Dead by Daylight 10th Anniversary Recap: Announcements & Celebrations
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: Recaps the 10th anniversary broadcast, reveal cadence, and upcoming content beats.

operations.title: Dead by Daylight’s Anniversary Party Is Almost Here
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: Previews the anniversary party schedule, rewards, and event cadence.

operations.title: Jason Has Finally Come To Dead by Daylight
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: Confirms the Jason chapter launch as the tentpole beat of the anniversary season.

operations.title: The Entity Unveiled: A Guide To Dead by Daylight’s Eldritch Horror
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: Lore feature expanding the Entity framing around Dead by Daylight current horror positioning.

patches.title: 10.0.2 | Bugfix Patch
patches.author: Behaviour Interactive
patches.contents: 10.0.2 re-enables The Doctor in the anniversary queue, nerfs The Slasher’s Deputy’s Badge trigger range, and fixes a broad set of Black Banquet, audio, character, and map issues.

patches.title: 10.0.1 | Bugfix Patch
patches.author: Behaviour Interactive
patches.contents: 10.0.1 prepares the June 25 Black Banquet event, ships Shane Wiigwaas, tunes Cross-Examination, and delivers a broad bug-fix pass across audio, characters, maps, perks, and UI.

patches.title: 10.0.0 | Jason Patch Notes
patches.author: Behaviour Interactive
patches.contents: 10.0.0 brings the live Jason chapter and The Slasher, plus aura customization, a Killer Power Match Details tab, and a large bug-fix pass across characters, audio, and maps.

patches.title: 10.0.0 | Jason PTB Patch Notes
patches.author: Behaviour Interactive
patches.contents: 10.0.0 PTB opens the Jason chapter test with The Slasher, Omnipresent Evil / Throwing Spikes, and a fresh round of perk and UI changes.

patches.title: 9.6.2 | Bugfix Patch
patches.author: Behaviour Interactive
patches.contents: 9.6.2 is a stability-focused hotfix covering 2v8, audio, characters, maps, perks, platform compatibility, and flashing-light fixes.

patches.title: 9.6.1 | Bugfix Patch
patches.author: Behaviour Interactive
patches.contents: 9.6.1 continues cleanup around Diminishing Returns documentation, progress bar presentation, and numeric tuning for Doctor and Ghost Face.

store.name: 黎明杀机
store.short_description: 10年恐惧相伴。10年的惊吓与刺激体验。10年的残暴献祭与惊险逃脱。 永久困于邪恶的幻境之中，即使死亡也无法逃脱，这是一场需要勇气和智慧的较量，四名意志坚定的逃生者在残忍对局中面对嗜血杀手。选择一方，进入多人非对称竞技游戏世界，获得最佳恐怖游戏体验。
store.short_description_en: 10 years of horror. 10 years of jump scares and close calls. 10 years of brutal sacrifices and thrilling escapes. Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits.
